_comment: QuickBooks Online OAuth credentials. Copy to ~/.config/bookie/qbo-credentials.json and fill in. client_id+client_secret are the DEVELOPMENT keys from developer.intuit.com (My Hub > Workspaces > [your workspace] > [your app] > Keys & Credentials > Development). refresh_token + realm_id + refresh_token_expires_at are populated automatically by scripts/qbo-authorize.sh.
